name: enforce-evidence
description: Remind to collect evidence when marking features complete

hooks.message:
Before marking work complete, verify evidence is collected:

```bash
# Validate evidence exists
python3 ~/.claude/plugins/local/shared-utilities/scripts/evidence_ops.py validate <feature-id>
```

Required evidence:
- `test-results.md` - Actual test output (not template)
- `validation.md` - DoD verification (filled in)
- `screenshots/` - Playwright captures (if UI work)
